case_title: ADETOKUNBO AJIKE VS. UNITED DOMINION REALTY, L.P.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AJIKE, ADETOKUNBO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED DOMINION REALTY, L.P. DBA EDGEWATER $653.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $698.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
